title: licenserc configuration
description: Configuration for licenserc license header and dependency checking tool.

excludes.description: Dependencies to exclude from license analysis.

files.description: Dependency manifest files to scan (e.g. go.mod, Cargo.toml, package.json). Paths are relative to the config file location.

licenses.description: Manually declare licenses for dependencies that cannot be automatically identified.

require_fsf_free.description: When true, only FSF Free/Libre-marked licenses are considered compatible.

require_osi_approved.description: When true, only OSI-approved licenses are considered compatible.

threshold.description: Minimum percentage of a file's content that must contain license text for the license to be identified.

version.description: Specific version(s) to exclude. Empty excludes all versions.

dependencyLicense.description: Manual license declaration for a dependency.

name.description: Dependency identifier. Format varies by ecosystem: package path (Go), GroupID:ArtifactID (Maven), package name (NPM).

version.description: Comma-separated versions (e.g. "1.0,2.0,3.0"). Empty matches all versions.

header.description: License header configuration. Accepts a single header config (V1) or an array of header configs (V2) for multi-module projects.

comment.description: Controls PR commenting behavior for CI/GitHub Actions integration.

language.description: Override or customize comment styles for specific languages.

license-location-threshold.description: Maximum number of characters from the start of a file where the license header can be located. A header beyond this threshold is treated as missing.

paths.description: Glob patterns specifying which files to check. Supports doublestar (**) syntax.

paths-ignore.description: Glob patterns specifying which files to exclude. .git and .gitignore entries are automatically ignored.

comment_style_id.description: Reference to a built-in comment style.

extensions.description: File extensions that trigger this language config (e.g. [".go"]).

content.description: Full license header text. Takes precedence over spdx-id when both are specified. Supports [year], [owner], and [software-name] placeholders.

copyright-owner.description: Copyright holder name. Replaces [owner] in SPDX templates.

copyright-year.description: Copyright year or range (e.g. "2024", "2020-2024"). Replaces [year] in templates. Defaults to current year.

pattern.description: Regex pattern to match existing license headers. Enables flexible validation of varying header formats.

spdx-id.description: SPDX license identifier. Used to select a built-in header template.
